# Development Guide

**IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS FOR CLAUDE CODE AND AI TOOLS:**

## DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE

**All updates MUST be made to [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) instead.**

`AGENTS.md` is the single source of truth for this project. When you need to:
- Add new build commands or workflows
- Document new features or modules
- Update code conventions or style rules
- Add critical rules or best practices
- Update testing/debugging procedures
- Document performance optimizations
- Update PCRE conformance status
- Make ANY documentation changes

**→ Edit AGENTS.md, NOT this file.**

This file exists only as a redirect to maintain compatibility with tools that expect CLAUDE.md.

---

## For All Development Guidance, See:

**[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** - The authoritative reference containing:
- Build commands and workflows
- Module architecture
- Code conventions and style
- Critical rules and best practices
- Testing and debugging
- Performance optimization
- PCRE conformance status
- All project documentation
